overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character walking through a rural post-apocalyptic landscape. The character travels along paved roads and dirt paths past an abandoned wooden barn with silo, through grassy fields with hay bales, surrounded by pine forests and distant snow-capped mountains.

scene_state.functional_zone: paved rural road through pine forest

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the paved road toward a distant farm structure

entered.detail: two-lane asphalt road with yellow dividing lines
dense evergreen trees lining both sides of the road
snow-capped mountain peaks visible on the horizon
green directional sign with white text
large wooden agricultural building with weathered gray siding

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a paved two-lane road surrounded by dense pine forests. A green road sign for Camp Sherman is visible on the right as the character approaches a weathered wooden barn in the distance, with snow-capped mountains looming on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned farmstead with barn and silo

events.description: turns off paved road onto dirt path approaching weathered barn
passes the barn structure and continues on winding dirt path

agents.ego_description: walking past the abandoned barn and silo structure, exploring the farmstead area

entered.detail: tall cylindrical grain silo next to the barn
unpaved gravel and dirt trail leading past the farm buildings
weathered wooden fence posts along the property line

segments.scene_description: The character turns onto a dirt path leading to a weathered wooden barn with a tall metal silo. The paved road is left behind as the character explores the abandoned farmstead, passing wooden fences and overgrown vegetation before continuing past the structures.

events.description: exits immediate farm area into open grassy landscape with rocky outcrops

agents.ego_description: continuing along the dirt path through grassy terrain with scattered rocks and hay bales

entered.detail: large boulders and rocky formations rising from the grass
cylindrical bales of hay scattered throughout the meadow

segments.scene_description: Leaving the barn behind, the character follows a winding dirt trail through an open grassy meadow. Rocky outcrops and scattered hay bales dot the landscape, with snow-capped mountains visible in the distant background.

scene_state.functional_zone: open meadow with hay bales and distant forest

events.description: character stops walking and crouches to look around the meadow
camera pans to reveal more of the surrounding valley and distant structures

agents.ego_description: stops to crouch and observe the surroundings, surveying the meadow and distant buildings

entered.detail: distant derelict structures and ruins in the valley below
broken wooden fence line running through the tall grass

segments.scene_description: The character enters a wide grassy field filled with hay bales, then stops to crouch and survey the surroundings. The camera reveals a panoramic view of the valley, with distant abandoned buildings, forested hills, and towering snow-capped mountains under a bright sun.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from a secluded forested road into a wide, sun-drenched valley. It begins with the character walking along a paved two-lane road flanked by dense pine forests, passing a green road sign for Camp Sherman as a weathered barn and snow-capped mountains appear on the horizon. As the character leaves the pavement behind, the scene shifts onto a dirt path that leads through an abandoned farmstead featuring a tall metal silo and overgrown wooden fences. The camera then follows a winding trail away from the barn and into an open grassy meadow dotted with rocky outcrops and scattered hay bales. Finally, the movement opens into a wide field where the character crouches to reveal a panoramic view of the valley, encompassing distant abandoned buildings and forested hills beneath towering mountains and a bright sun.
